parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'casa-network-analyst', prompt: 'Focus on beaconing detection. Perform: periodicity scoring with jitter analysis, check common C2 intervals (30s, 60s, 300s, 600s, 3600s), DNS anomaly detection (high-entropy domains, TXT queries, unusual lengths), JA3/JA3S fingerprint analysis. Investigation context: ' + $json.query, stream: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'casa-purple-mapper', prompt: 'Validate and refine these pre-matched MITRE ATT&CK techniques and NIST CSF mappings against the beaconing analysis findings. Pre-matched MITRE techniques: ' + JSON.stringify($('MITRE Lookup').item.json.techniques) + ' NIST CSF mappings: ' + JSON.stringify($('NIST CSF Mapper').item.json.nist_csf_mappings) + ' Analysis findings: ' + $('MITRE Lookup').item.json.analyst_findings, stream: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'casa-synthesizer', prompt: 'Synthesize this beaconing investigation into a comprehensive report. Include: executive summary, beaconing pattern analysis (intervals, jitter, confidence score), DNS anomaly findings, JA3/JA3S analysis, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, risk assessment, potential C2 framework identification, and prioritized response actions. All findings: ' + ($json.response || JSON.stringify($json)), stream: false }) }}
